programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe.

programme.title: 101 East
programme.desc: 101 East follows the journey of two Sherpa women as they seek to conquer Everest and overturn centuries of discrimination against Nepalese widows.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe.

programme.title: Football Rebels
programme.desc: The compelling story of Saturnino Navazo who fought against fascism in the Spanish Civil War and then survived a Nazi concentration camp by playing football.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe.

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: In Tunisia, Ghofrane Binous, a 25-year-old Black woman from a working-class neighbourhood runs for national elections.

programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe.

programme.title: My Zimbabwe
programme.desc: Bringing nature and people together, Elias Libombo helps ease the coexistence between Gonarezhou National Park and local communities.

programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe.

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: Is the West's increasing appetite for cobalt, a metal vital for electric cars, causing birth defects in the Democratic Republic of Congo?

programme.desc: The Stream looks at how South Africa is coping amid a third wave of coronavirus.

programme.title: Generation Change
programme.desc: Young Lebanese organizers discuss strategies for combating corruption and sectarianism at a critical moment in Lebanon's history.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time in Punchbowl
programme.desc: The Lebanese Civil War forces around 30,000 Muslims and Christians to flee their homeland and join an exodus to Australia to start new lives (1/4).

programme.title: Frames
programme.desc: As a child Djemba became one of the thousands of children who live hand to mouth on the streets of Sub-Saharan Africa's largest shanty town, Kibera.

programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe.

programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.desc: A French-Moroccan mother is determined to fight hatred with love after her son is killed in a spate of gun attacks by Mohamed Merah.

programme.desc: Counting the Cost provides background to the economics stories that shape our world and impact the lives of ordinary people.
